title: Croatian Chickpea Wrap
description: A flavorful and nutritious wrap filled with roasted chickpeas, umami-rich sauce, and crispy croatian bread. A delicious and easy-to-make meal for any time of the day.
instructions: Rinse the chickpeas and dry them with a paper towel.
In a bowl, toss the chickpeas with olive oil, salt, and pepper.
Spread the chickpeas on a baking sheet and roast for 20-25 minutes, or until crispy.
While the chickpeas are roasting, warm the wrap in the oven for 2-3 minutes.
Spread the umami-rich sauce on the wrap, leaving a small border around the edges.
Add the roasted chickpeas on top of the sauce.
Fold the wrap in half to enclose the filling.
